description: One spatial feature = one AT record. Consumed by mst-projector under shardKey = 'com.etzhayyim.maps.feature' which projects the collection into an atproto MST and emits com.etzhayyim.substrate.shardSnapshot (ADR-2605171800 + ADR-2605191655). geometry is GeoJSON-string-encoded and bbox is integer microdegrees (×1e7) because the AT lexicon schema does not support float arrays or float numbers.

label.description: Feature kind: Building / Road / River / Place / AdminArea / Spot / Port / Airport / Station / Coastline / Mountain / Lake / Railway / SeaRoute / AirRoute / BusRoute / BusStop / etc.

geometryGeoJson.description: GeoJSON Geometry object (Point / LineString / Polygon / MultiPolygon) encoded as JSON string. AT lexicon cannot hold float arrays natively.

h3Cell.description: H3 cell id (hex string) at the resolution declared by h3Resolution. Carried in the record so projector indexers (kg / spatial side-index) can partition without re-parsing geometry.

h3Resolution.description: H3 resolution (0-15). 8 ≈ neighborhood, 10 ≈ block, 12 ≈ building footprint.

bboxWestE7.description: Bounding-box west longitude in degrees × 1e7 (integer-encoded; AT lexicon disallows floats).

properties.description: Arbitrary feature properties as JSON-encoded string. Keep <16KB; larger blobs (e.g. raster tiles, photogrammetry chunks) should be pinned to IPFS separately and referenced by CID inside this field.
